channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: iPhones Just Got a Whole Lot Smarter with Widgets
item.description: Discover how iPhone widgets can revolutionize your daily productivity and access to information in this tech guide.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Network jobs watch: Hiring, skills and certification trends
item.description: Network and infrastructure roles continue to shift as enterprises adopt technologies such as AI-driven network operations, multicloud networking, zero trust network access (ZTNA), and SD-WAN.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Dude Perfect went from YouTube to raising $100M. Here’s how its new CEO wants to grow the brand
item.description: Over the past 15 years, sports and entertainment company Dude Perfect—which started as a YouTube channel where five best friends posted videos of trick shots in different sports—has grown into a media juggernaut with attendant cruises, toy lines, and TV deals.
item.dc:creator: Yasmin Gagne, Fast Company

item.title: What you need to know about brain-training games
item.description: Some 2.3 million U.S. adults over 65—more than 4%—have a diagnosis of dementia. But even without a diagnosis, a certain amount of cognitive decline is normal as age sets in.
item.dc:creator: The Conversation, Fast Company

item.title: How to make your VPN faster
item.description: Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson explains how a VPN — virtual private network — works and how running it can slow down the operation of your device.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Go Programming Language Turns 15: Future Plans for Large Multicore Systems and AI Workloads
item.description: The Go programming language turns 15 years old, with plans to adapt to large multicore systems, advanced hardware instructions, and the needs of AI workloads.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Democratic Senators Call for Investigation into Elon Musk's SpaceX Contracts
item.description: Democratic senators urge federal investigation into Elon Musk's involvement in SpaceX contracts amid concerns over his ties with Russian President Vladimir Putin.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Matt Gaetz, Trump’s attorney general pick, and the FTC’s Lina Khan share some surprising views on Big Tech
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump’s announcement that he is selecting Matt Gaetz to be his attorney general sent shock waves through Washington, D.C.—and certain other parts of the country.
item.dc:creator: Chris Morris, Fast Company

item.title: Elon Musk Expands Lawsuit Against OpenAI, Accusing Microsoft of Antitrust Collusion
item.description: Elon Musk expands his lawsuit against OpenAI, accusing the company and Microsoft of antitrust collusion and blocking competition from other AI companies.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Biden administration finalizes $6.6B in chips grants for TSMC before Trump takes office
item.description: The White House on Friday announced it had finalized an agreement with a major semiconductor manufacturer to invest billions of dollars in facilities in Arizona as President Biden looks to cement parts of his legislative legacy before leaving office in January.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, The Hill

item.title: Exoskeleton helps paralyzed people regain independence
item.description: The WalkON Suit F1, an exoskeleton developed to help people with disabilities, can actually walk over to a person in a wheelchair, solving a major problem.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AI is dumber than you think
item.description: OpenAI recently introduced SimpleQA, a new benchmark for evaluating the factual accuracy of large language models (LLMs) that underpin generative AI (genAI).
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Man who stole and laundered roughly $1B in bitcoin is sentenced to 5 years in prison
item.description: A computer expert who stole bitcoin worth billions of dollars at current prices — and then spent years laundering some of the hacked cryptocurrency with help from his wife — has been sentenced to five years in prison.
item.dc:creator: Michael Kunzelman, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Polymarket at center of political storm after reported FBI raid
item.description: Prediction betting market Polymarket and its founder and CEO Shayne Coplan have found themselves at the center of a debate about political betting after the FBI reportedly raided Coplan’s home on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Musk: DOGE will be 'tedious work' with 'zero' compensation
item.description: Elon Musk said in a post on the social platform X on Thursday that the brand new Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) — an advisory group under President-elect Trump focused on slashing government costs and restructuring federal agencies — will require "tedious work" with "zero" compensation.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, The Hill

item.title: Cisco amps up Splunk observability platform
item.description: As promised, Cisco is making changes to its observability product portfolio to help customers better manage applications across on-premises, hybrid, and multi-cloud environments.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: EU slaps Meta with a nearly 800 million euro fine for engaging in 'abusive' Marketplace practices
item.description: European Union regulators hit Facebook parent Meta with a fine of nearly 800 million euros on Thursday for what it calls “abusive practices” involving its Marketplace online classified ads business.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Solar-powered aircraft achieves groundbreaking 22-hour autonomous flight
item.description: Skydweller is the world's largest unmanned solar-powered aircraft that can stay airborne for weeks, and even months, without refueling.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: FBI, CISA say Chinese hackers breached multiple US telecom providers in targeted attack
item.description: The U.S. government said it is investigating after People's Republic of China hackers targeted commercial telecommunications service providers in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chinese hackers target Tibetan websites in malware attack, cybersecurity group says
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — A hacking group that is believed to be Chinese state-sponsored has compromised two websites with ties to the Tibetan community in an attack meant to install malware on users' computers, according to findings released Wednesday by a private cybersecurity firm.
item.dc:creator: DAVID RISING, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Bitcoin neared $90,000 in a new record high. What to know about crypto's post-election rally
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — As money continues to pour into crypto following Donald Trump's reelection last week, bitcoin has climbed to yet another record high. The world's largest cryptocurrency topped $89,000 for the first time, briefly peaking at $89,995 early Tuesday, according to CoinDesk.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Alarming rise of fake legal requests: What it means for your privacy
item.description: Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says there’s been a rise in cybercriminal services using hacked police and government emails to send subpoenas and data requests to U.S. companies.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
